name: Grapes Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the grapes well and drain them.
2. Either leave the grapes whole or split them in half lengthwise.
3. Arrange the grapes in individual dessert bowls.
4. Sprinkle the grapes generously with dark brown sugar.
5. Top each bowl with sour cream.
6. Allow the dish to sit until the sour cream sinks down and melts the brown sugar, allowing the flavors of the three ingredients to marry before serving.
